title: Geography
text: GEOGRAPHY NAMID—THE WORLD CONTINENTS/LAND MASSES (so far) Afrikah Cel-Romano/Cel-Romano Alliance of Nations Felidae Fingerbone Islands Storm Islands Thaisia Tokhar-Chin Brittania/Wild Brittania Great Lakes —Superior, Tala, Honon, Etu, and Tahki Other lakes— Feather Lakes/Finger Lakes River— Talulah/Talulah Falls Cities or villages— Hubb NE (aka Hubbney), Jerzy, Lakeside, Podunk, Sparkletown, Talulah Falls, Toland DAYS OF THE WEEK Earthday Moonsday Sunsday Windsday Thaisday Firesday Watersday
